---
title: "Cardio — Project Summary"
author: "Tianqi Ouyang"
date: last-modified
---

## Overview

The **Cardio** sub-project characterizes the cardiopulmonary (echocardiographic) phenotype of HRS-AKI patients treated with terlipressin in the [HARMONY Terlipressin Registry](../../Terlipressin/docs/). The goal is to assess whether baseline echo abnormalities are associated with HRS response, 90-day mortality, and terlipressin-associated respiratory failure.

## Cohort

Analysis is restricted to patients with at least one non-missing measurement among:

- `echo_ef` — Left-ventricular ejection fraction
- `echo_earatio` — Mitral E/A ratio
- `echo_eeratio` — E/e′ ratio
- `echo_gls` — Global longitudinal strain
- `echo_lateral_e` — Lateral e′ velocity

## Abnormal-Echo Indicators

Six binary flags are derived from the continuous echo variables:

| Flag | Abnormal cutoff | Rationale |
|:-----|:----------------|:----------|
| `echo_ef_abnormal` | EF ≤ 50% | Reduced systolic function |
| `echo_eeratio_abnormal` | E/e′ ≥ 15 | Elevated LV filling pressure |
| `echo_gls_abnormal` | GLS < 18 (absolute) | Impaired strain |
| `echo_lateral_e_abnormal` | Lateral e′ < 10 cm/s | Diastolic dysfunction |
| `echo_tr_abnormal` | TR velocity > 2.8 m/s | Pulmonary hypertension signal |
| `echo_lavi_abnormal` | LAVI > 34 mL/m² | Left-atrial enlargement |

## Stratifications

Table 1 is produced for each of the following stratification variables:

| Strata | Description |
|:-------|:-----------|
| `hrs_responders` | 3-level: non-responder / partial / complete |
| `hrs_responders_cat_2` | Binary: any AKI-stage improvement |
| `time_to_death_status_90days` | 90-day mortality |
| `terli_ae_respfail` | Terlipressin-associated respiratory failure |

## Data Pipeline

```{mermaid}
flowchart TD
    A[final_master_01282026.xlsx<br/>main Terlipressin project] --> B[Source shared_pipeline.qmd]
    B --> C[Filter: any non-NA echo<br/>EF, E/A, E/e′, GLS, lateral e′]
    C --> D[Derive 6 echo-abnormal flags]
    D --> E[Table 1 stratified by<br/>hrs_responders, hrs_responders_cat_2,<br/>90-day mortality, respiratory AE]
```

## Repository Structure

| File | Description |
|:-----|:-----------|
| `docs/analysis.qmd` | Canonical Quarto analysis (echo cohort → abnormal flags → stratified tables) |
| `Code/cardio 2026.Rmd` | Analyst-facing Rmd version (Jan 2026) |
| `Code/Cardio.Rmd` | Earlier analyst version (filter via `*_notavailable___999`) |
| `Requests/Echo Data Request 01292016.docx` | Original analyst specification |
| `Results/` | Rendered HTML and CSV outputs |
